validate.notes: Docker build passes, NOP test passes (reward=0), Gold test passes (reward=1). Rubric judge fails (ICR=0.0) because the rubric judge implementation uses extract_config_hunks() which only extracts config file changes (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, etc.), but this bug fix only modifies code files (conversion.ts). The rubric rules are style guidelines from AGENTS.md that describe coding conventions, not required file modifications. The judge cannot evaluate them because: (1) extract_config_hunks returns 0 chunks for code files, (2) the gold solution doesn't modify any config files, (3) the rubric rules have no reference content to compare. This is a fundamental incompatibility between the rubric judge design (for config/doc edits) and this bug fix task (code-only changes). The original rubric rules were enriched from AGENTS.md by a previous agent but are genuinely unreasonable for this task type.
